name: Deoxys Delta Normal Forme - Holon Phantoms

abilities.name: Form Change
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for another Deoxys and switch it with Deoxys.

attacks.name: Crystal Laser
attacks.text: During your next turn, Deoxys's Crystal Laser attack does 20 damage plus 40 more damage.

tests.name: crystal_laser_stacks
tests.description: Test Crystal Laser does +40 on next turn
